rules_summary: Write/destructive kubectl or Kafka actions require explicit UI confirmation and server acknowledged confirmed flag.
kubectl exec uses -c kafka; each exec sets export JMX_PORT=<random high port> to avoid JMX bind collisions
sanitize_name pattern ^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$ for topic/group/namespace user input
AWS profile dropdown uses a fixed list in backend/aws_profiles.py (not ~/.aws/credentials); session key p → AWS_PROFILE on every kubectl
AWS (cloud=aws): subprocess_env merges ~/.aws/credentials keys for the selected profile into each kubectl/aws child process
PostgreSQL password: operator file data/sensitive/.pg_password (gitignored) for psql user clarisite
kubectl log streaming: GET /api/k8s/logs/stream?workload=&pod=&container= (session); leaving a page calls stopWorkloadLogStream()
Bump VERSION in server.py and mirrored cache-bust / footer on every release
kubectl context must remain visible in the header

routes.response: { ok, profiles[], default_profile, meta{ source: builtin } } — fixed list, does not read ~/.aws

routes.notes: Home defaults from data/sensitive/last_connected.json + regions + clouds

routes.body: { connect?, cluster_name?, namespace?, aws_profile?, cloud?, region? }
routes.effect: Optional aws eks update-kubeconfig / az aks get-credentials; then cluster-info; writes data/sensitive/last_connected.json

routes.notes: topics_min / topics_substring apply to panel topics_partition_counts only
Pod replica counts per known Glassbox component in session namespace
kubectl exec kafka pod: du -sk /bitnami/kafka/data/*; response table is per-topic total MB (sorted desc) + default_num_brokers (read-only)
409 + needs_confirmation when risky and confirmed false
409 when SQL not read-only and confirmed false
kubectl exec + curl to 127.0.0.1:9200 in ES pod
Custom GET path only; 409 if path not on allowlist
409 when SQL not read-only and confirmed false
409 when CQL not read-only and confirmed false

cassandra.cqlsh_notes: Server resolves cqlsh: GB_STS_CQLSH if set, else /opt/bitnami/cassandra/bin/cqlsh and common paths, else PATH
